name: std-coding-academy
description: Coding academy: sequence/build/event programming challenges (game-shell) plus a student progress dashboard.

emits.description: Fired when SeqChallenge fails to load

children.content: Arrange the action blocks in the correct order.

emits.description: Fired when BuildChallenge fails to load

children.content: Drag components into the slots to build the solution.

emits.description: Fired when EventChallenge fails to load

children.content: Wire the event handlers to fire on the right triggers.

emits.description: Fired when the BrowseItem collection finishes loading; payload.data holds the (possibly paginated) slice and totalCount holds the unsliced filter total. totalCount is optional so compiled-path emitters that haven't been migrated yet still validate
